title: Mashal #4913
definition:
Mashal = "entreaty"

 1) a town in the territory of Asher allotted to the Gershonite Levites
    1a) also 'Mishal' and 'Misheal'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mashal = "entreaty"

 1) a town in the territory of Asher allotted to the Gershonite Levites
    1a) also 'Mishal' and 'Misheal'

    NASB:  a place in Asher (the same as 4861)
